head.hi: Proposal for Insertion in the Final Act, Submitted by the Delegation of the State of Vietnam
head.note: For text of the Vietnamese proposal, see supra.

div.p: The Conference takes note of the declaration of the Government of the State of Viet-Nam to the effect that it undertakes:
To make and to support every effort for the restoration of peace in Viet-Nam;
Not to use force to oppose the agreed procedure for execution of the cease-fire, despite the objections and reservations it has expressed, in particular in its final statement.
